title: KandyToys Out There! Waterproof Fleece Picnic Blanket | Assorted Designs | Roll Up Blanket | Camping Equipment
features: Adventure Calls - This "Out There! Red Tartan Picnic Blanket" offers comfort, protection and portability. Perfect for the park, beach, camping trips and garden
Great Design - The soft fleece topped picnic rug is backed with a waterproof lining, keeping you dry if the ground is damp and wet
Super Convenient - The blanket folds into an attached flap with a handle, making it easy to transport and pack away
Measures - Unfolded 1.5 x 1.3 metres. Folded blanket measures 20 x 33 x 9cm.
Assorted Designs - 3 beautiful assorted tartan colours, 1 supplied at random
description: Product description The Out There! Picnic Blanket offers comfort, protection and portability with fleece topping and waterproof lining. The picnic rug folds into an attached flap with handle making it easy to transport and back away. Unfolded blanket measures 1.5 x 1.3 metres. Folded blanket measures 20 x 33 x 9cm. Safety Warning Dry clean only. Do not machine wash or dry clean at home to avoid potential safety hazards.
